summary: Product progress review complete. Validated TASK-163 (marketplace UI design, 9.0/10) and TASK-180 (performance optimization, 9.5/10). Both tasks meet acceptance criteria and align with product vision. TASK-163 unblocks TASK-166 (marketplace browser). TASK-180 establishes performance foundation. No scope gaps identified. Recommendations: start TASK-166 immediately, measure bundle size impact, prioritize TASK-164 (integration cards).
